texto: A more fundamental questions suggests itself, however. How did the most powerful military in history come to devote its elite forces and advanced technology to the hunt for a man like Qari Munib, a midlevel Taliban figure in a remote corner of the planet, half a world away from the White House and ground zero in Manhattan, more than eleven years after the September 11 attacks?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a ryan devereaux: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a saude mental. O trecho “A more fundamental questions suggests itself, however. How did the most powerful military in hist…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que saude-mental, 9-11, drone-attacks pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de drone-attacks e qari-munib.
